title: Infinity Bag
description: Adds the Magic Duplicator, an item that duplicates anything. Hilariously ruins your vanilla experience!
body:
# About the mod
The **Magic Duplicator** is a quirky and game-changing mod that adds an item capable of duplicating almost anything in Minecraft. From blocks to items, this tool defies the standard mechanics of the game, allowing you to duplicate resources without any effort. While it may seem like a fun addition, it definitely ruins the vanilla experience by removing the challenge of resource management and crafting. Perfect for those who want to break the game's rules and just have fun!
